title: sorbus alnifolia var. hirtella
intro: Sorbus alnifolia var. hirtella is a variety of mountain ash tree, a deciduous shrub or small tree native to East Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sorbus alnifolia var. hirtella include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional medicine to create tinctures and extracts.
